name: Baked Hash Browns
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the hash brown patties in a greased 13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in. baking dish.
2. Sprinkle the patties with salt and garlic powder.
3. Pour the whipping cream over the patties.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 50 minutes.
5. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the potatoes.
6. Continue baking for 5-10 minutes longer or until the potatoes are tender and the cheese is melted.
